Dual Status XXX
 U_FD_MEDICAID_IP_DAYS Total number of Medicaid Inpatient Days determined from the start and end date from the MAX data during months of 'Full' Dual Status* XXX
 U_FD_MEDICAID_IER_VST Total number of Medicaid Inpatient ER visits during months of 'Full' Dual Status XXX
 U_FD_MEDICAID_OER_VST Total number of Medicaid Hospital Outpatient ER visits during months of 'Full' Dual Status XXX
 U_PD_MEDICAID_DRUG_RX Total number of Medicaid Prescriptions during months of 'Partial' Dual
